content.en:
"The resources are almost exhausted!"

Ye Tian sighed deeply, at his level, there were too many resources needed for cultivation, far from being comparable to the time of the Heavenly Monarch, not to mention that his cultivation speed was fast, and there were many things that needed to be improved, and the speed of consuming resources was incomparable to others.

"It's no wonder that Pengyu Heavenly Monarchs and other Heavenly Monarchs also lack Void Heaven Points!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After millions of years of penance, his strength has improved a lot, far beyond the beginning.

The Blood River Immortal Technique is a great achievement, the Extreme Sword Divine Power is a great achievement, the space-time transfer technique is the peak of Xiaocheng, the ninth layer of the Xuanxuan Jue is the peak of the entry, and the prototype of the Great Dao has walked more than 5,000 meters......

At this time, Ye Tian was already ranked 102nd on the Heavenly Monarch List.

This level is already very powerful, and the other Heavenly Monarchs around this level have basically mastered a Chaos Divine Power of the Consummation Realm, and they have also raised their physical bodies to the extreme level, and they are very powerful in all aspects.

Although Ye Tian was inferior to those Heavenly Monarchs in some aspects, his foundation was too strong, so his combat power was extremely terrifying.

Of course, Ye Tian mainly didn't have a truly powerful offensive Chaos Divine Power, otherwise his ranking on the Heavenly Monarch List would have already rushed to the top 100.

However, Ye Tian is almost immortal, other Heavenly Monarchs can't kill him at all, if he fights with him for a long time, no matter how strong the Heavenly Monarch is, he will be grinded to death by him!

"Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch, it's your turn!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He has not forgotten the fact that the Dark God will assassinate him, and the reason why he did not make a move against the Dark God Society is because he does not want to startle the snake.

Moreover, he was very weak before, and the assassination was not necessarily successful.

What's more, the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch possesses the Chaos Divine Power of Great Realm Shifting, and once he kills the Immortal Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch with one blow, the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch will escape.

The Great Realm Shift is known as the strongest escape supernatural power, unless the two chaotic supernatural powers of the Fate Collapse Technique and the Primordial Curse Technique, and with a strength far beyond the Splitting Sky Monarch, he can bombard and kill the Splitting Sky Monarch regardless of distance.

But the inheritance of these two chaotic supernatural powers is very rare, and there is not even a vein of the Void Heaven, so Ye Tian naturally has no place to study.

"Kill the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch first!"

Ye Tian decided.

The strength of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch is slightly weaker, and his life-saving ability is even worse, far inferior to the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch.

If he were to kill the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, there was almost no possibility of failure.

-----------

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch has been living a very uncomfortable life for a period of time, and his status in the Dark God Society has dropped again and again.

Originally, with his strength, he could only rank outside the top ten in the Dark God Society, but because of his high intelligence, he was a military figure, and even a powerful Heavenly Monarch with unlimited potential such as the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch had to listen to his arrangement.

But now, he has failed two missions in a row.

One was to assassinate Ye Tian and inform him if he failed, and the other was to form an alliance with the Heavenly Fire Sect, but the Heavenly Fire Sect was finished, and the alliance naturally broke, and it also made the Void Heaven Temple hate them, and several times the plan was destroyed by the Void Heaven Temple.

After two failures, he naturally took the blame.

If he is strong, even if he fails two missions, it is nothing.

But the key is that his strength is not good, and a command mistake is a major mistake, so his status has been lowered a lot.

This time, he was assigned by the Dark God Society to go to the Demon Clan to receive a Demon genius, and that Demon genius showed a very superior talent and was qualified to become a reserve member of the Dark God Society.

Once the wooing is successful, his status will naturally be improved.

Just as he was about to arrive at the demon territory, a terrifying sword slashed at him.

"Not good!"

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch was terrified, and before he could make any moves, his entire body completely lost its vitality, turning into a corpse lying in the starry sky.

After the fall of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, a figure appeared next to the body of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, and this person was Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took away the treasure on the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch and moved away.

"Next, Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch!"

......

The headquarters of the Dark God Society.

After the fall of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, the Heavenly Monarchs located in the headquarters all knew about it.

"The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch has fallen!"

"Didn't that guy from the Black Tower go to the Demon Clan? The Demon Race is just a native race, and the strength is very weak, there are only a few weak Heavenly Monarchs, and those Heavenly Monarchs are not as good as some powerful god generals, how could that guy from the Black Tower fall on the way to the Demon Clan?"

"He should have been killed by someone else, but the whereabouts of the Black Tower will not be revealed, who will kill him?"

"Investigate it immediately and find it clear, our Dark God Society can only assassinate others, and now someone dares to assassinate the Heavenly Monarch of our Dark God Society. After all, the Black Tower is the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Monarch List, and it is even expected to become a true ancestor in the future, and the fall of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch is a huge loss for our Dark God Society and even the Dark God Temple!"

"Let the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch investigate him, his life-saving means are very strong, as long as he is not killed by a single blow, no one at the Heavenly Monarch level can kill him!"

Subsequently, the Sky Splitter Heavenly Monarch received an order to investigate the fall of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch.

Soon, the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch came to the place where the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch fell.

"One hit kills!"

The Sky Splitter was surprised.

Judging from the surrounding traces, the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch was killed by the enemy with one blow.

Although the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch is not strong, he is also the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Monarch List, and the person who can kill the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch with one blow must be the Heavenly Monarch at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List, and he must be within the three hundred Heavenly Monarch List.

"Who is it?"

The Sky Splitter was speculating.

That's when it happened.

He panicked in his heart, and a sense of crisis came.

In the next moment, the space was blocked.

A large avenue more than 10,000 meters wide and more than 5,000 meters long has taken shape, and the power of each avenue has manifested, as if it can suppress everything.

"How can there be so many avenues !!!"

The Sky Splitter Heavenly Monarch was shocked.

He didn't dare to stay here, and he wanted to escape in an instant.

However, the spatial blockade coupled with the power of the Endless Dao was another sneak attack, which made the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch a little slower.

And it was this that slowed down a little, so that the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch completely lost the possibility of escaping.

Swish!

A figure appeared, holding the long knife made of the gold-devouring divine power, burning nearly half of its strength and slashing the strongest sword.

Tear and pull!

This sword directly slashed the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch into two, and one of his body was teleported away under the instinct of the Great Realm.

Somewhere in the universe, it's a small world.

Only half of his body teleported here, but his eyes had lost their lustre.

Ye Tian's knife directly cut off his vitality and soul, and he was already completely dead.

Soon.

Ye Tian followed the spatial fluctuations and the connection between the two bodies of the Split Sky Heavenly Monarch to find this small world.

If the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch was still alive, it would naturally be easy to erase the traces, so that Ye Tian would not be able to find them, but the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch was dead, and there was no way to erase the traces, so Ye Tian found it.

As soon as the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch died, all the treasures on his body fell into Ye Tian's hands.
